requirements.title: Volume discount for large trades
requirements.text: Trades of 5,000 tonnes or more receive a 3% discount on the unit price before any handling fee is applied.
requirements.notes: This requirement is honored in the healthy baseline. If a scenario linked to this requirement fails, and the failure ratio does not match any known FIX pattern (PATTERN-001, PATTERN-002, PATTERN-003), the backend is violating an approved, existing requirement - this is a genuine product defect, not a stale test.
